meaning: n.傻子,笨蛋,笨人,多愁善感的人
examples: My wife's an old softy who cries at sad movies.
Who'd have thought he'd turn out to be such a softy.
Who'd have thought he'd turn out to he such a softy.
Lest anyone take Mr. Rubio for an immigration softy, he has co-sponsored Senate enforcement legislation championed by restrictionists.
Mr Steinmeier, who already challenged Mrs Merkel in 2009 and lost, is seen as a softy and did not want to go through the circus again.
